decimal/Underflow.name: Underflow
decimal/Underflow.description: Numerical underflow with result rounded to zero. Occurs when a subnormal result is pushed to zero by rounding. Inexact and Subnormal are also signaled.

info.excerpt: Numerical underflow with result rounded to zero. Occurs when a subnormal result is pushed to zero by rounding. Inexact and Subnormal are also signaled.
